criteria.original: User can submit the form with valid input and see a success message.
adversarial_cases: Submit valid input twice in rapid succession (under 200ms apart); only one record should be created server-side and the UI should show success exactly once.

criteria.original: Form validation rejects empty required fields with an inline error message.
Logout button signs the user out and redirects to /login.
adversarial_cases: After logout, navigating back via browser history should not restore the authenticated session.
